microsoft_ft: Defined the upstream product roadmap for Azure's resilience portfolio, translating customer insights and operational needs into clear requirements that sustained 45+ annual validation drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, partnering across engineering and commercial teams to define product requirements and self-service capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled execution across the portfolio.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, grounding the product concept in customer value and delivering a rack-level program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model.

Influenced release planning and portfolio availability by integrating commercial insights, customer requirements, and operational constraints into early product decisions, directing 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility to maximize return on investment.

Represented the commercial perspective on a **sovereign-cloud network isolation** test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, synthesizing technical constraints and stakeholder feedback across functions and geographies into actionable roadmap guidance.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows that reduced planning cycle time by **39%** and increased drill capacity by 21% while validating feasibility with engineering partners.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that translated clinical-style user needs into clear requirements, driving utilization across **14 key teams** and saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, synthesizing customer feedback into prioritized feature gaps and validating concept feasibility with R&D partners.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and transitioning documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and improving cross-functional information access at scale.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, connecting upstream strategy with downstream launch execution.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths grounded in customer value.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, surfacing data-driven themes to guide strategic portfolio recommendations.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, balancing commercial readiness with technical feasibility.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across engineering and operations stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25%** and ensuring smooth, scalable launch execution in the field.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, translating customer needs into repeatable commercial workflows.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market strategy**, developing promotion approaches and optimizing the website and Google profile to drive market adoption.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, applying number-crunching and order-intake review to identify and seal margin leaks and guide strategic recommendations.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary: upstream roadmap, commercial perspective, market/business analysis, go-to-market, win/loss, feasibility with R&D.
Relabeled roles to Product Manager to match upstream PM framing; led with strong action verbs and quantified outcomes.
Surfaced analytical/financial skills (pricing, order-intake, business cases) and cross-functional stakeholder influence per JD fit criteria.
Expanded bullets to near-full 2-line density to fill the page while staying within the 290-char ceiling.
